description: Right-of-Way Encroachment — processes encroachment permits for work within public rights-of-way including utility cuts, sidewalk repairs, and temporary street closures

hard_stops.label: Traffic Control Plan Not Approved
hard_stops.logic: Work within the right-of-way requires an approved traffic control plan per MUTCD — plan not submitted or not approved

hard_stops.label: Insurance Certificate Not on File
hard_stops.logic: Applicant has not provided the required liability insurance certificate naming the jurisdiction as additional insured

soft_flags.label: Major Arterial Impact
soft_flags.logic: Encroachment is on a major arterial road — may require coordination with traffic engineering and off-peak work hours

soft_flags.label: Extended Duration
soft_flags.logic: Encroachment duration exceeds 14 days — may require additional public notification and detour signage
